architecture.summary: Fix localized to github-tree.ts in vskill repo. Add third regex for plugins/*/skills/*/SKILL.md with negative lookahead for specweave. No platform code changes needed.

integrations.summary: Platform discovery already handles non-specweave paths. Re-crawl/reindex needed, not code changes.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - no UI changes, search results are pass-through

performance.summary: N/A - adding one more regex check has negligible impact on discovery

security.summary: N/A - negative lookahead preserves specweave framework plugin exclusion

edge-cases.summary: All 7 skills across 5 non-specweave plugins should be discoverable. Regression test for non-specweave paths required.
